nodes.name: gacha.py
nodes.summary: Cryptographically-random gacha (draw) engine for the openclaw-persona-forge skill, selecting persona traits (archetypes, moods, domains, shadows, aesthetics) from weighted pools and printing a formatted persona card.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses the `secrets` module for cryptographically-secure randomness rather than `random`, appropriate for unpredictable persona generation.

nodes.name: pick
nodes.summary: Selects a random element from a pool list using cryptographically-secure random index selection via secrets.randbelow.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Entry point that reads command-line arguments, draws persona trait components from pools, and prints the complete formatted persona card to stdout.

nodes.name: gacha.sh
nodes.summary: Thin shell wrapper that invokes gacha.py with the current Python interpreter, passing through all arguments for use from the SKILL.md workflow.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill definition for the openclaw persona-forge (龙虾灵魂锻造炉), a six-step guided or gacha-mode workflow for generating distinctive AI agent personas with archetype, mood, domain, shadow, aesthetic, and name, outputting a structured YAML persona file.
nodes.languageNotes: Mixed Chinese-English: section headings and core conceptual prose are in Chinese while usage and compatibility sections are in English, indicating the skill targets a bilingual audience.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill definition for a multi-agent open-source pipeline that forks a private project, sanitizes secrets and proprietary content via sub-agents, packages it with CI/CD scaffolding, and optionally publishes to GitHub.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill definition for the orch-add-feature operation, a thin orchestrator wrapper that triggers the shared orch-pipeline engine specifically configured for adding a new feature to an existing codebase.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill definition for the orch-build-mvp operation, a thin orchestrator wrapper that triggers the shared orch-pipeline engine configured to build a minimum viable product from scratch.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill definition for the orch-change-feature operation, a thin orchestrator wrapper that triggers the shared orch-pipeline engine configured to modify or refactor an existing feature.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill definition for the orch-fix-defect operation, a thin orchestrator wrapper that triggers the shared orch-pipeline engine configured for diagnosing and fixing a reported defect.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Shared orchestrator pipeline engine skill that all orch-* operation skills delegate to, defining right-sizing classification, five execution phases, two approval gates, agent/command mapping, security-review triggers, and handoff artifact conventions.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill definition for the orch-refine-code operation, a thin orchestrator wrapper that triggers the shared orch-pipeline engine configured to refine, clean up, or improve existing code without changing behavior.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill defining a pattern for parallelizing agent tasks across four lanes (Codebase, Tests, Docs, Config) with lane dependency rules, output shape requirements, and failure-mode handling to maximize throughput on multi-file changes.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive modern Perl development patterns reference covering v5.36+ pragmas, subroutine signatures, OO with Moo/Corinna, error handling, regex, data structures, file I/O, module organization, and tooling (perltidy, perlcritic, carton).

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive Perl security patterns reference covering taint mode, input validation, ReDoS prevention, safe file operations, SQL injection via DBI placeholders, web XSS/CSRF/session hardening, output encoding, CPAN module vetting, and perlcritic security policies.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive Perl testing patterns reference covering TDD workflow, Test::More fundamentals, Test2::V0 modern framework, test organization with prove, fixtures, mocking with Test::MockModule, coverage with Devel::Cover, and integration testing best practices.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill for generating a structured /orchestrate command payload from a user task: detects ECC mode and language, decomposes steps, selects agents from the authoritative catalog, compresses task descriptions, and self-validates before emitting the final orchestration plan.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill definition for the Plankton code-quality integration with ECC, describing its three-phase lint/format/fix architecture, config tamper-guard, package-manager enforcement, ECC hook-profile pairing, and configuration reference.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL quick-reference skill covering index selection strategies, data type choices, common query patterns, anti-pattern detection queries, and a production-ready configuration template.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill defining a guardrailed research workflow for resolving prediction-market questions via primary sources, with structured output contract and integration patterns for Polymarket, Manifold, and similar platforms.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill defining risk-review gates for prediction-market operations, checking advice boundary, venue/regulatory compliance, data quality, security, and privacy before allowing a trade or position to proceed.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive Prisma ORM patterns reference covering ID strategy, schema defaults, include vs select, transaction form selection, PrismaClient singleton, N+1 prevention, cursor pagination, soft delete, error handling, serverless connection pool, and an extensive anti-patterns catalogue.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill for translating a high-level product capability request into a structured, implementation-facing contract by restating the capability, resolving constraints, defining the interface, and mapping to execution tasks.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill providing four product-thinking modes (diagnostic, founder review, user journey audit, feature prioritization) to evaluate what to build before committing to implementation.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill for conducting a structured production readiness audit across security/auth, data integrity, payments/webhooks, operations, and UX, producing a scored findings report with risk ratings and remediation actions.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Domain-knowledge skill for manufacturing production scheduling, covering scheduling fundamentals, changeover optimization, bottleneck management, disruption response, OEE metrics, ERP/MES integration patterns, decision frameworks, escalation protocols, and KPI tracking.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill for managing project flow across git and Linear, defining a four-step workflow: read public surface, classify work, decide whether Linear tracking is warranted, and keep both systems consistent.
